_description: Dynamic conversion rules for resolving Bucket 1 unknowns. Each rule defines how to derive a clinical fact from existing patient data. Rules are loaded at runtime by derive_clinical_facts() and applied when the required fields are present.
_types: formula | lookup | data_search | threshold | logic | cross_reference
_auto_generated_rules_below: Rules below the manual section are auto-generated by the post-run analysis. They go through a review queue before being marked active.

rules.description: Convert ECOG Performance Status to Karnofsky Performance Score

1.description: Restricted in strenuous activity but ambulatory

2.description: Ambulatory, capable of self-care, unable to work

3.description: Limited self-care, confined to bed/chair >50% of waking hours

4.description: Completely disabled, totally confined to bed/chair

rules.output_template: KPS SCORE (converted from ECOG): ECOG {ecog} = KPS {kps_range} (minimum {kps_min}). {description}

rules.description: Convert Karnofsky Performance Score to ECOG
Calculate BMI from height and weight
Calculate Body Surface Area (Du Bois formula)
rules.output_template: BSA: {result} m² (Du Bois formula from height {height_cm}cm, weight {weight_kg}kg)

rules.description: Search treatment history for prior immunotherapy/checkpoint inhibitors
rules.output_if_found: PRIOR IMMUNOTHERAPY: Patient HAS received immunotherapy — found: {matches}
rules.output_if_not_found: PRIOR IMMUNOTHERAPY: NO checkpoint inhibitors or immunotherapy found in treatment records. Drugs reviewed: {drugs_searched}

rules.description: Search treatment history for prior platinum-based chemotherapy
rules.output_if_found: PRIOR PLATINUM THERAPY: Patient HAS received platinum chemotherapy — found: {matches}
rules.output_if_not_found: PRIOR PLATINUM THERAPY: NO platinum-based chemotherapy found in treatment records

rules.description: Search treatment history for prior fluoropyrimidine therapy
rules.output_if_found: PRIOR FLUOROPYRIMIDINE: Patient HAS received fluoropyrimidine — found: {matches}
rules.output_if_not_found: PRIOR FLUOROPYRIMIDINE: NO fluoropyrimidine found in treatment records

rules.description: Search treatment history for prior taxane therapy
rules.output_if_found: PRIOR TAXANE: Patient HAS received taxane therapy — found: {matches}
rules.output_if_not_found: PRIOR TAXANE: NO taxane found in treatment records

rules.description: Search all records for organ transplant history
rules.output_if_found: TRANSPLANT HISTORY: Evidence of transplant found — {matches}
rules.output_if_not_found: TRANSPLANT HISTORY: NO organ transplant documented in comorbidities, treatment history, or surgical records

rules.description: Search all records for seizure/epilepsy history
rules.output_if_found: SEIZURE HISTORY: Evidence of seizure disorder found — {matches}
rules.output_if_not_found: SEIZURE HISTORY: NO seizure disorder or anticonvulsant medications found in medical records

rules.description: Search all records for interstitial lung disease
rules.output_if_found: ILD HISTORY: Evidence of interstitial lung disease found — {matches}
rules.output_if_not_found: ILD HISTORY: NO interstitial lung disease, pneumonitis, or pulmonary fibrosis found in comorbidities, radiology reports, or respiratory review of systems

rules.description: Determine active smoking status from social history

logic.result: NEVER SMOKER — patient has never smoked tobacco
FORMER SMOKER — patient quit smoking. NOT an active smoker
CURRENT SMOKER — patient is actively smoking

rules.description: Determine childbearing potential from age and gender

logic.result: Male patient — pregnancy/contraception criteria not applicable
Female, age {age} — post-menopausal (≥55). NOT of childbearing potential. Pregnancy not possible.
Female, age {age} — likely post-menopausal (50-54). Pregnancy unlikely but not confirmed without testing.
Female, age {age} — potentially of childbearing potential. Requires confirmation.
Treatment-naive — 0 prior lines of systemic therapy
{count} prior line(s) of systemic therapy documented: {regimens}
